summary_text: Directory structure found under `/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318/`: - `brief.json` - `content.json` - `mobile-cue.json` - `research.json` - `slides.json` - `speaker-notes.json` - `talktrack.md` No subdirectories and no `.pptx` file were present in this tree. Minimum sanity checklist to confirm PPTX still matches this artifact set: 1. Confirm artifact snapshot integrity: verify only these 7 files (or expected exact set) are used as input/version control source. 2. Verify output PPTX includes the same number of slides as `slides.json` defines. 3. Spot-check slide order: cross-walk slide sequence in `slides.json` → PPTX page order. 4. Validate slide content drift: key headlines/bullets in each slide row match `content.json`/`slides.json` in order. 5. Validate presenter notes parity: all `speaker-notes.json` entries map to corresponding PPTX notes without omissions. 6. Validate delivery/format constraints from metadata files (`brief.json`, `research.json`, `mobile-cue.json`) are reflected in layout or notes. 7. Re-run checksum/hash on source artifacts and ensure generated PPTX metadata/build metadata points to this exact artifact revision (not an older/newer directory).
